text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analyzing data without being explicitly programmed. A more advanced type of machine learning is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information in ways similar to the human brain. AI has many applications in daily life, such as voice assistants on smartphones, recommendation systems on streaming platforms, and navigation apps that suggest the fastest routes. These technologies make everyday tasks easier and more efficient.
